name: Content Preview
manifest: {"id":"flotiq.content-publishing","name":"Content Preview","description":"The plugin generates links that let you open drafts and public versions of pages directly from the editor. With one click, users can quickly save and open the draft version, streamlining their workflow for maximum efficiency. It works best with Next.js-based sites that use draft mode.","version":"1.0.2","repository":"https://github.com/flotiq/flotiq-ui-plugin-content-publishing","url":"https://plugins.flotiq.com/files/flotiq.content-publishing/1.0.2/index.js","permissions":[{"type":"CO","canRead":true,"canUpdate":false,"canCreate":false,"canDelete":false,"ctdName":"*"}]}
description: The plugin generates links that let you open drafts and public versions of pages directly from the editor. With one click, users can quickly save and open the draft version, streamlining their workflow for maximum efficiency. It works best with Next.js-based sites that use draft mode.

name: Live Preview
manifest: {"id":"flotiq.live-preview","name":"Live Preview","description":"The Live Preview Plugin is used for real-time transmission of data from content object forms, allowing the end application to display content changes live.","version":"0.8.0","repository":"https://github.com/flotiq/flotiq-ui-plugin-live-preview","url":"https://plugins.flotiq.com/files/flotiq.live-preview/0.8.0/index.js","permissions":[]}
description: The Live Preview Plugin is used for real-time transmission of data from content object forms, allowing the end application to display content changes live.

name: Multilingual plugin
manifest: {"id":"flotiq.multilingual","name":"Multilingual plugin","description":"Multilingual Plugin is an advanced plugin that allows easy addition and management of translations while editing objects. It supports multiple languages and enables users to define and manage their own language sets.","version":"0.10.1","repository":"https://github.com/flotiq/flotiq-ui-plugin-multilingual","url":"https://plugins.flotiq.com/files/flotiq.multilingual/0.10.1/index.js","permissions":[{"type":"CO","canRead":false,"canUpdate":true,"canCreate":false,"canDelete":false,"ctdName":"_plugin_settings"},{"type":"CTD","canRead":true,"canUpdate":true,"canCreate":false,"canDelete":false,"ctdName":"*"}]}
description: Multilingual Plugin is an advanced plugin that allows easy addition and management of translations while editing objects. It supports multiple languages and enables users to define and manage their own language sets.

name: Slug
manifest: {"id":"flotiq.slug","name":"Slug","description":"This plugin automatically generates a slug based on existing data within a Content Object and enters the slug data into another field.","version":"1.2.1","repository":"https://github.com/flotiq/flotiq-ui-plugin-slug","url":"https://plugins.flotiq.com/files/flotiq.slug/1.2.1/index.js","permissions":[]}
description: This plugin automatically generates a slug based on existing data within a Content Object and enters the slug data into another field.

name: SurferSEO Content Optimization Plugin
manifest: {"id":"flotiq.surferseo-content-analyzer","name":"SurferSEO Content Optimization Plugin","description":"Use leading content optimization platform directly in Flotiq and never miss a chance to increase your visibility in search engines!","version":"1.1.4","repository":"https://github.com/flotiq/flotiq-ui-plugin-surferseo-content-optimization-plugin","url":"https://plugins.flotiq.com/files/flotiq.surferseo-content-analyzer/1.1.4/index.js","permissions":[]}
description: Use leading content optimization platform directly in Flotiq and never miss a chance to increase your visibility in search engines!
